title: equisetum × trachyodon f. moorei
intro: Equisetum × trachyodon f. moorei, also known as horsetail, is a hybrid perennial plant species that belongs to the Equisetaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Equisetum × trachyodon f. moorei include treating urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and skin conditions, as well as helping to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Equisetum × trachyodon f. moorei can be prepared for medicinal use through teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected areas.
